math_definition: x if x>=0, a*x if x<0 where a~U(lower,upper) in training, a=(lower+upper)/2 in eval

ranking_rationale: leaky_relu=exact eval-mode structural match with SFPSETCC sign-branch pattern and uint32-encoded slope param, prelu=same conditional slope-multiply logic in clean sfpi v_if style (easier to read/adapt), rand=directly implements Uniform(lower,upper) PRNG generation needed for training mode using init_prng_seed+TTI_SFPMOV PRNG instruction, dropout=shows init_seed+per-element PRNG+conditional-apply pattern at both LLK and kernel API level, selu=two-parameter activation (v >= 0.0f / v_else branch) with dual uint32 bitcast params in unary_op_utils showing how to register two-param op
